mapper.select: SELECT m.*, e1.player_name AS player1_name, e2.player_name AS player2_name, r.winner_entry_id AS result_winner_entry_id FROM match_game m JOIN entry e1 ON m.player1_entry_id = e1.id LEFT JOIN entry e2 ON m.player2_entry_id = e2.id LEFT JOIN match_result r ON m.id = r.match_id WHERE m.round_id = #{roundId} ORDER BY m.table_number ASC

SELECT m.*, e1.player_name AS player1_name, e2.player_name AS player2_name, r.winner_entry_id AS result_winner_entry_id FROM match_game m JOIN entry e1 ON m.player1_entry_id = e1.id LEFT JOIN entry e2 ON m.player2_entry_id = e2.id LEFT JOIN match_result r ON m.id = r.match_id WHERE m.id = #{id}

SELECT m.*, e1.player_name AS player1_name, e2.player_name AS player2_name, r.winner_entry_id AS result_winner_entry_id FROM match_game m JOIN entry e1 ON m.player1_entry_id = e1.id LEFT JOIN entry e2 ON m.player2_entry_id = e2.id LEFT JOIN match_result r ON m.id = r.match_id WHERE m.player1_entry_id = #{entryId} OR m.player2_entry_id = #{entryId}
SELECT m.* FROM match_game m JOIN tournament_round r ON m.round_id = r.id WHERE r.tournament_id = #{tournamentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO match_game (round_id, table_number, player1_entry_id, player2_entry_id, is_bye) VALUES (#{roundId}, #{tableNumber}, #{player1EntryId}, #{player2EntryId}, #{isBye})

INSERT INTO match_game (round_id, table_number, player1_entry_id, player2_entry_id, is_bye) VALUES
(#{item.roundId}, #{item.tableNumber}, #{item.player1EntryId}, #{item.player2EntryId}, #{item.isBye})
